name: funloom-minigame-maker
description: Create, adapt, validate, and package Funloom/002 iframe minigames.

interface.shortDescription: Build ZIP minigames for the 002 minigame node.
interface.longDescription: Create or adapt lightweight HTML/CSS/JavaScript minigames that run inside the Funloom/002 minigame iframe. The skill validates ZIP shape, packages source directories, and guides basic success/failure or creator-confirmed advanced result states such as perfect.
defaultPrompt: Adapt this web game for the 002 minigame node.
Validate and package this minigame source.
